heading: Conditions of indemnity; purchase of property by Commission
label: 2366 Conditions of indemnity; purchase of property by Commission
notes: Transfer of FunctionsAtomic Energy Commission abolished and functions transferred by sections 5814 and 5841 of this title. See also Transfer of Functions notes set out under those sections.

children.label: a
children.text: notice is given to the Commission at a time when the conditions of are satisfied;section 2364 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: the sale is made within such time as the Commission may prescribe and in a manner which the Commission determined to afford adequate assurance of a fair price without excessive costs; and

children.label: c
children.text: the Commission is given such prior notice of the sale and such opportunity to become a purchaser as it shall prescribe.
